title: Focus Visibility & Design Token Fixes
description: Add missing focus-visible ring styling to keyboard-navigable elements across TagInput, LandingPage, Pricing, and OnboardingChecklist; fix NavBar avatar fallback accessible label; replace hardcoded amber color in NotesEditor with design tokens; fix PublicPipeline StagePill decorative aria-label; and add aria-selected to CommandPalette active result row.

userStories.title: Add focus-visible ring to TagInput input field
userStories.description: TagInput.jsx input element has focus:outline-none but no focus-visible:ring-* classes, making keyboard focus invisible for users who navigate by keyboard. Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-1 (or matching project token) to the input field.
acceptanceCriteria: TagInput.jsx input element has focus-visible:ring-2 (or equivalent) in its className
focus:outline-none is preserved to avoid double-ring with the custom ring
The ring only appears on keyboard focus, not mouse click
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add focus-visible rings to LandingPage nav and footer links
userStories.description: LandingPage.jsx anchor links in the nav bar (e.g. href='#features') and footer link list items lack focus-visible:ring-* classes. Keyboard users receive no visual focus indicator when tabbing through these links. Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:outline-none to all anchor/link elements in the LandingNav and footer sections.
acceptanceCriteria: LandingPage.jsx nav anchor links (href='#features', etc.) have focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:rounded (or equivalent) classes
Footer link list items have matching focus-visible ring classes
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add focus-visible rings to Pricing.jsx FAQ summary elements
userStories.description: Pricing.jsx FAQ accordion uses native <details>/<summary> elements. The <summary> elements lack focus-visible:ring-* styling so keyboard users see no focus indicator when tabbing through the FAQ items. Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:outline-none to each <summary> element.
acceptanceCriteria: Each <summary> element in Pricing.jsx has focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:outline-none (or equivalent) in its className
The ring does not appear on mouse click (focus-visible only)
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add focus-visible ring to OnboardingChecklist extension install link
userStories.description: OnboardingChecklist.jsx extension install link (<a> element pointing to Chrome Web Store) has hover styling but no focus-visible:ring-* classes. Keyboard users cannot see focus on this link. Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:outline-none to the anchor element.
acceptanceCriteria: OnboardingChecklist.jsx extension install <a> element has focus-visible:ring-2 (or equivalent) classes
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-label to NavBar avatar fallback span
userStories.description: NavBar.jsx shows a fallback avatar span (showing initials or a placeholder) when no profile image is available. This span lacks an accessible label so screen readers cannot announce whose avatar it is. Add aria-label={`${user.display_name ?? user.email}'s avatar`} to the fallback span element.
acceptanceCriteria: NavBar.jsx fallback avatar span has aria-label including the user's display name or email
The aria-label format is '{name}'s avatar' or equivalent
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Replace hardcoded amber color in NotesEditor with design token
userStories.description: NotesEditor.jsx uses hardcoded Tailwind color classes text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400 for an unsaved-changes indicator or similar UI element. These bypass the design token system. Replace with an appropriate semantic token (e.g. text-warning if defined, or the closest token in the project's tailwind config).
acceptanceCriteria: NotesEditor.jsx no longer uses text-amber-600 or text-amber-400 hardcoded classes
The replacement uses a design token class consistent with the project's color system
The visual appearance is equivalent (amber/warning color)
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Fix PublicPipeline StagePill decorative span aria-label
userStories.description: PublicPipeline.jsx StagePill component renders a colored dot span with aria-label={stage}. The dot is a decorative indicator — the stage name is already conveyed by nearby visible text. The aria-label on a non-interactive decorative span causes duplicate announcements. Replace aria-label with aria-hidden='true' on the dot span.
acceptanceCriteria: PublicPipeline.jsx StagePill dot span has aria-hidden='true' instead of aria-label={stage}
The stage name is still conveyed by visible text elsewhere in the component
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-selected to CommandPalette active result row
userStories.description: CommandPalette.jsx PaletteRow renders the currently active/highlighted result with a visual highlight but no aria-selected attribute. Screen reader users cannot tell which result is currently active. Add aria-selected={isActive} to each PaletteRow button and ensure the parent container has role='listbox' (or role='list' with role='option' on items).
acceptanceCriteria: CommandPalette.jsx PaletteRow has aria-selected={isActive} (true for the active row, false or undefined for others)
The parent results container role is consistent with the child role (listbox+option or list+listitem)
Build passes with no errors
